file_name: VGS Fall Tour 2026 - Flyer and Plaque

content.headline: Vidalia Garden Society Fall Tour
content.address: Vidalia Community Center, 404 Mulberry Street, Vidalia GA 30474
content.accessible_route_wording: Wheelchair-accessible entry via the west door. Ramps at all bed stops.
content.rain_plan: Light rain: tour proceeds. Heavy rain: indoor plant showcase in Room 3.

sponsor_list.name: Vidalia Family Dentistry
sponsor_list._coherence_note: CONFLICT with signed letter which shows $750 - C2

content.title: The Vidalia Garden Society thanks our 2026 Fall Tour sponsors
content._coherence_note: Vidalia Family Dentistry appears at $500 - must be corrected to $750 before Nov 5 print pickup

_coherence_summary: Sponsor list matches Contentful B10 and Webflow B12 on the $500 Vidalia Family Dentistry line - all three lag the signed letter and Stripe payment which show $750. This is C2. Rain plan line is one revision older than the current Contentful newsletter, which added the community center Room 3 detail on 2026-10-14.
